title: Chris' Alien Origins
description: Embark on an interstellar adventure with this datapack, introducing a diverse array of alien Origins that will fundamentally reshape your Minecraft experience.
body:
Embark on an interstellar adventure with this datapack, introducing a diverse array of alien Origins that will fundamentally reshape your Minecraft experience. Origins created by Chris_The_Big! Made for the Phone Home Jam on the Origins Discord Server! Includes the [Novaling Origin](https://modrinth.com/datapack/novaling-origin) Pehkui and Apugli required!! ## Khellion Tall, slender species of skilled hunters, with four piercing eyes known for their incredible speed and predatory instincts. Their hearing enables them to pinpoint the location of prey with uncanny precision. They are highly intelligent and possess a deep understanding of their environment.
Spoiler

Lunge

(Primary key)

You can lunge yourself forward.

Thermal Vision

(Secondary key)

Your enhanced vision temporalily highlights nearby creatures (orange), players (red), and tamed animals (green), giving you the edge in any encounter.

Piercing Eyes

Your four piercing eyes allow you to see very well in the dark.

Ground Slam

Landing from high distances, while holding shift, will damage nearby enemies if they are on the ground.

Strong Legs

You take less fall damage. You can also crouch before impact to reduce most of your fall damage.

Experienced Climer

With the grip of your claws, you are able to scale any wall with ease.

Long Legs

You can step up one block tall surfaces as if they were slabs.

Mighty Claws

You have sharp claws, which you use to pin your targets down. They are also used for digging and climbing.

Swiftness

Your predatory instincts grant you the swiftness to secure your meal.

Night Hunter

Your Speed and Strength are increased during the night.

Tough Skin

You've developed natural armor to protect yourself against any potential threats.

Taller

You are a little taller.

Carnivore

Your diet consists of only meat.

Deadly Fire

Fire is one of your major weaknesses.

Always Hungry

You're always on the move, always hunting, thus you have to eat more to survive.

Useless Equipment

Your claws make it so you can't use shields effectively. You also don't rely on wings for hunting. You prefer silent stalking of your prey.
## Crystallien Crystalliens are semi-sentient to hyper-intelligent lifeforms composed of living crystalline matrices. Their bodies resemble intricate, shifting geometric structures that grow, refract, and resonate with energy.
Spoiler

Excavator

Your claws allow you to dig very well.

Ore Fanatic

You get a chance to receive extra resources from mining ores.

Crystal Hands

Your Crystalized Hands increase your damage output by a bit.

Crystallized Candy

You can eat a piece of Amethyst Shard, which grants you Resistance and Haste.

Crystal Skin

The crystals on your back grant you natural armor to protect yourself against threats.

Sturdy Body

You have 12 hearts of max health.

Crystal Eyes

Your Crystalized Eyes allow you to see very well in the dark.

Slow

You walk slowly due to the massive crystals on your back and you also can't sprint when below 7 hunger shanks.

Explosion Weakness

Your crystals are vulnerable to explosions so you take double the damage from any kind of explosion.

Useless Equipment

You're unable to use shields effectively. You're also too heavy to use wings.
## Aquilonian Tall, powerfully built humanoids. These hardy and resilient creatures with thick fur and piercing eyes inhabit a planet with extreme cold and harsh conditions. Their fur changes hue slightly depending on the season—from icy white-blues during the long winter to a slate gray during the planet's brief thaw.
Spoiler

Roar

(Primary key)

Roar to stun your enemies, giving everyone in a six block radius slowness 6 and blindness for 5 seconds.

Strong Arms

You possess great strength.

Sturdy Legs

You take less fall damage.

Frigid Terrains

Boosted damage and speed when in cold environments.

Keen Eyes

Your eyes allow you to see very well in the dark.

Carnivore

Your diet consists of only meat.

Gold Discomfort

You cannot wear any armor sets that use Gold.

Deadly Fire

Fire is one of your major weaknesses.

Wet Fur

When in contact with water, your fur gets wet and you become slower.
## Audax Highly adaptable, intelligent beings with elongated, feline bodies and iridescent hides. Their multifaceted eyes perceive a wide spectrum of light. Driven by insatiable curiosity, they are natural explorers, venturing into the unknown and sharing their discoveries. Agile and quick-witted, the Audax are peaceful but possess remarkable speed, razor-sharp claws, and the ability to generate energy bursts.
Spoiler

Energy Burst

(Primary key)

You generate Energy Bursts that deal damage to your foes.

Backpack

(Secondary key)

You carry a backpack around wherever you go.

Adventurer

You gain twice the amount of experience points.

Night Stalker

You are able to see better and move faster while in darkness.

Catlike Appearance

Creepers are scared of you and will only explode if you attack them first.

Velvet Paws

Your footsteps don't cause any vibrations which could otherwise be picked up by nearby lifeforms.

Full Belly

You're more energetic at full hunger.

Less Health

You have 7 hearts of max health.

Fast Metabolism

A small body performing great movements requires a large amount of food.

Need for Mobility

You can not wear any heavy armor (armor with protection values higher than chainmail).

Claustrophobia

Being somewhere with a low ceiling for too long will weaken you and make you slower.
## Aetherian Ethereal beings with translucent bodies and bioluminescent markings are native to a planet shrouded in perpetual twilight. Their name is inspired by the astral plane, a realm of consciousness and higher understanding, which reflects their connection to the spiritual aspects of life.
Spoiler

Astral Drift

(Primary key)

You can partially phase out of the physical realm, allowing yourself to move through solid objects and avoid physical harm, although your actions are very limited.

Twilight Bloom

(Secondary key)

When in communion with the planet's natural twilight, you can channel planetary energy to heal allies, purify corruption, or manipulate local flora.

Spiritual Eyes

Your eyes allow you to see very well in the dark.

Pacifist

You are a pacifist, so you deal less damage to everything.

Deadly Fire

Fire is one of your major weaknesses.

Vegetarian

You can't digest any meat.
## Novaling Living flame, hailing from a volcanic world of scorching heat and bone-chilling cold, your body is a fusion of fire, lava and crystal. Your name reflects your volatile nature, referencing the explosive power of a nova.
Spoiler ### Burning Wrath When on fire, you channel the flames into your next attack, dealing more damage. ### Crystal Defense _(Secondary Active)_ You sheath yourself in unyielding crystal, gaining brief resilience. ### Fire Immunity You are immune to all types of fire damage. ### Magma Swiftness Standing on Magma blocks gives you a speed boost! ### Crystal Hands Your Crystalized Hands increase your damage output by a bit. ### Obsidian Skin Your hard skin provides you with natural armor. ### Crystallized Candy You can eat a piece of Amethyst Shard, which grants you Speed and Haste. ### Molten Maneuvering You are able to swim and see better when submerged in lava. _(Extinguish yourself if you're on fire by pressing Load Hotbar Activator!)_ ### Hydrophobia You take damage in water. ### Cold smothers Fire When it's freezing, your body works harder to stay warm, which can make you feel sluggish and less coordinated. ### Inhuman Hands You are unable to use a shield due to how your alien like hands. ### Vertically Gifted You're a bit tall and slender. ### Hotblooded Due to your hot body, venoms burn up, making you immune to poison and hunger status effects.
